What we offer

Pharmacy services in Bengaluru

From prescription pickup to chronic care — we make pharmacy effortless.

Home Delivery

Free doorstep delivery within 2km radius. Same-day in most areas.

Prescription Assistance

Send a photo of your prescription — we'll read, verify, and prepare it.

Medicine Sourcing

Can't find a rare or imported medicine? We source it for you within 24–48 hours.

Health Products

Supplements, wellness, baby care, beauty, and personal care essentials.

Medical Equipment

BP monitors, glucometers, nebulizers, oximeters and more — with usage guidance.

Refill Reminders

Tell us your chronic medication — we'll remind and refill on time.

Reddy Pharma

Genuine medicines, fast home delivery, and trusted care for families in Bengaluru.
